testcase.name: test_product_backward_compat_case_quantity

failure.message: AssertionError: fallback from case_quantity failed: {'product_id': 'prod_b104dd346c', 'company_id': 'ckfrozen', 'name': 'TEST_P2_BackCompat', 'description': '', 'category': '', 'unit': 'pcs', 'units_per_case': 1, 'cost_price': 5.0, 'selling_price': 10.0, 'case_price': 0, 'cases_on_hand': 0, 'available_cases': 0, 'weight_info': '', 'sku': 'TEST-P2B-1776643257654', 'status': 'Active', 'created_at': '2026-04-20T00:00:57.695294+00:00', 'created_by': 'user_test_ai30qogd8wq'} assert 1 == 6 + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe05671be980>('units_per_case') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe05671be980> = {'available_cases': 0, 'case_price': 0, 'cases_on_hand': 0, 'category': '', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority2_cases.py:87: in test_product_backward_compat_case_quantity assert body.get("units_per_case") == 6, f"fallback from case_quantity failed: {body}" E AssertionError: fallback from case_quantity failed: {'product_id': 'prod_b104dd346c', 'company_id': 'ckfrozen', 'name': 'TEST_P2_BackCompat', 'description': '', 'category': '', 'unit': 'pcs', 'units_per_case': 1, 'cost_price': 5.0, 'selling_price': 10.0, 'case_price': 0, 'cases_on_hand': 0, 'available_cases': 0, 'weight_info': '', 'sku': 'TEST-P2B-1776643257654', 'status': 'Active', 'created_at': '2026-04-20T00:00:57.695294+00:00', 'created_by': 'user_test_ai30qogd8wq'} E assert 1 == 6 E + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe05671be980>('units_per_case') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe05671be980> = {'available_cases': 0, 'case_price': 0, 'cases_on_hand': 0, 'category': '', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_stock_receipt_updates_inventory_and_product_cases

skipped.message: No inventory item linked to a product available for receipt test
